description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized ramucirumab in combination with erlotinib as a first-line treatment for adult patients with metastatic non-small cell lung cancer with activating EGFR variants.

indication.indication: Cyramza in combination with erlotinib is indicated for the first-line treatment of adult patients with metastatic non-small cell lung cancer with activating epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR) mutations.
